Tests the behavior of Math.pow with a non-numeric string input, expecting a NaN result.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the `Math.pow` function when given a non-numeric string as the base. The expression `Math.pow("qeqegfhb", 1)` is expected to return `NaN` (Not-a-Number), and the `assert` function checks that this condition is true. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific test case to ensure that the `Math.pow` function correctly handles invalid input types.
